title: Wax Lyrical Vanilla Flower, 40ml Reed Diffuser, White
features: Proudly Made in the English Lake District
This 40ml reed diffuser is bursting with fine fragrance and boasts a new formula which means the scent will infuse your home for even longer

As part of our ongoing commitment to the environment through our research and development Wax Lyrical use a alcohol free formula in its reed diffusers By using a more natural formula we are reducing our carbon footprint As well as being better for the environment they are also better for our customers too The new alcohol-free blend is scientifically proven to last longer and throws fragrance better
Vanilla pods burst in this soft and sweet scent Dry almonds are beautifully blended with creamy candy and buttery top notes whilst musk is added to the rich base
description: From the manufacturer Welcome to Wax Lyrical The UK's largest home fragrance company, making great products in a great place. Wax Lyrical is celebrating 40 years of home fragrance manufacturing and designing products that are inspired to capture the beauty of the English Lake District. Made In England In dedication to our home in the north of England and our commitment to producing home fragrances that are British-made, this collection is a true celebration of Wax Lyrical; our heritage, our values and our wonderful customers who have, over the years, become avid shoppers of this range. Shop Home Fragrance Classics Refresh your home with the bright and vibrant fragrances of the Made In England collection. Choose from 10 fragrances: English Lavender, Sea Breeze, Vanilla Flower, Rose Buds, Red Cherries, Mediterranean Orange, Lemon Verbena, Fresh Linen, Sunflower Fields and Exotic Fig.
